text: If you want to grow on IG in 2026 - it's not enough to post, you need...

A few more details on the New Instagram 👇

Instagram has always been an adaptive platform

It isn’t afraid to tweak its product to satisfy user demand

Look at stories or the removal of IGTV…

In this post, I have highlighted the changes since 2020

Most of them are straightforward, but I’d like to clarify a few:

1️⃣40/30/20 is a ratio I recommend for people starting on Instagram

The goal is to test Reels/Carousels/Photos, see what performs the best…

And then double down on the winners in a 60/25/15 ratio or a version of it

Reels are still the best way to gain “non-follower” reach if you are new

But Carousels and Photos shine in specific scenarios and niches

The original ratio also leaves you with 10% of content which can be experimental or adaptive

Sustainability is king for any content strategy. 

2️⃣Instagram SEO will only become more and more important

It has been on Instagram for a long time (for profiles)

But since 2021, it has only been getting better and better for content

Recently, your IG Reels have also started appearing on Google

And comments are also slowly becoming searchable

You can learn about IG SEO in my book (link in bio)

Or through my post from March 5th

👹• If you know someone growing on Instagram, share this with them and help them out

"The secret to viral content is...

Buying my course.”

This is the type of sh*t that most gurus say…

And 1 of the reasons I didn’t want to release a course for years:

- Even though I had ideas for several
- Even though people begged me to do so
- Even though I could’ve made millions if I did

It just didn’t feel right…

And after 1,000+ hours of consulting:

I’ve seen how helpless people feel after buying courses that never work

That’s why I created the Content Creation Dojo:

It's not the average BS course...

But a program I've spent countless nights obsessing over in the last 9 months…

My soon-to-be wife begged me to go to sleep. But I couldn't:

As the puzzle pieces fell into place, I knew I was making something special.

Not just a course for the heck of it:

But something I wish I had when I started. And now it's here...

1️⃣ You get all my knowledge from over 20,000 posts in 52 practical 5-minute lessons;

2️⃣ You get all the assets I use to make 110 posts per month (30+ deliverables)

3️⃣ You get seamless systems to keep the process fun, motivating and rewarding;

4️⃣ You get a personalised path through the program depending on your current needs;

5️⃣ You get access to me & many other talented creators who will support you on your content creation journey

Looking back at those late nights, I am so proud of the outcome…

I am proud:

- I waited 4 years
- I spent 9+ months on this
- I invested thousands in building it
- I beta-tested it with 50+ people

I am proud I can get this in your hands...

Because joining the Dojo will unlock a new level for your content, social media and business…

7 trends after growing 10M followers on Instagram…

Instagram has changed a lot in recent years

And believe me, as someone who grows his own profile, not only those of clients - it’s frustrating

Truth be told, I had more engagement/reach when I had 30K followers

But, not everything is doom and gloom.

Every like and reach I get now is worth a lot more

So, as long as you understand the foundational shifts

For example - DM automation saturating the comment section thus causing comments to not be as valuable anymore

You will be good to go.

And remember, on social media the ones who thrive are not the best designers, video editors, orexperts - it’s the most adaptable

Share this post and help spread the ways of the new Instagram
